🚀 Big Launches.title: PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, aiming to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Uber's product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn't want to be 'everything for everyone'
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal discusses the company's financial-services ambitions, its relationship with Waymo, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will notice.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Waze is getting an AI makeover with new features powered by Google's Gemini AI assistant, aiming to let users personalize their trips.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: A new method for solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly, using graph sparsification to improve computational efficiency.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Waze is integrating Google's Gemini AI assistant to let users personalize their trips, reflecting the broader push to integrate AI across products.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Anthropic starts localizing Claude pricing for India, its biggest market after the US
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Anthropic is offering Indian rupee-denominated subscription plans for Claude users in India, a move to cater to its biggest market after the US.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Satya Nadella has issued a shocking warning to companies using AI
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warns companies using AI to be cautious of proprietary models acting as Trojan horses, highlighting concerns about AI's potential downsides.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Should AI help you get away with killing your spouse?
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: A thought-provoking question about the ethics of AI, highlighting the need for responsible AI development and deployment.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A new approach to providing structured and interpretable assessments using the Toulmin model of argumentation, decomposing image-based diagnosis into components.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: A study on the variance of model scores due to prompt wrapper differences, introducing two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI) and the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice.

tool_of_day.title: GES-TSP: Graph Edge Sparsification for TSP
tool_of_day.summary: A new method for solving large-scale instances of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) exactly, using graph sparsification to improve computational efficiency.

hot_take: The tech industry is shifting towards responsible AI development and deployment, with companies like Microsoft and Anthropic taking steps to address concerns about AI's potential downsides.
